# Wildwood Psychotherapy
> Expert EMDR and IFS-Informed Trauma Therapy for Adults in Leesburg, VA.

Wildwood Psychotherapy provides refined, trauma-informed care specializing in EMDR, IFS, and relational therapy. We serve Leesburg, Western Loudoun, and provide telehealth across Virginia.

## Core Services
- [Home](https://wildwoodpsychotherapy.co/): Overview of practice philosophy and mission.
- [About](https://wildwoodpsychotherapy.co/about): Meet the team and learn about our approach to healing.
- [Trauma & EMDR](https://wildwoodpsychotherapy.co/trauma-and-emdr): Specializing in Eye Movement Desensitization and Reprocessing for trauma recovery.
- [ENM & Polyamorous Relationships](https://wildwoodpsychotherapy.co/relationships): Affirming therapy for ethical non-monogamy and polyamory.
- [Anxiety & Depression](https://wildwoodpsychotherapy.co/anxiety-and-depression): Therapeutic support for mood and stress management.
- [Therapy Intensives](https://wildwoodpsychotherapy.co/intensives): Deep-dive sessions for accelerated healing.

## Logistics & Access
- [Contact](https://wildwoodpsychotherapy.co/contact): Reach out for a free consultation.
- [Telehealth](https://wildwoodpsychotherapy.co/telehealth): Virtual therapy options available throughout Virginia.
- [FAQs](https://wildwoodpsychotherapy.co/faqs): Common questions about therapy, insurance, and fees.
- [Schedule Consultation](https://wildwoodpsychotherapy.clientsecure.me/): Direct link to our SimplePractice booking portal.

## Areas Served
- Leesburg, VA (Primary Office)
- Ashburn, VA
- Brambleton, VA
- Waterford, VA
- Round Hill, VA
- Purcellville, VA
- Bluemont, VA
- Western Loudoun County
- Remote Telehealth (Available throughout Virginia)
